---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new algorithm, format, or API addition
title: '[Feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What would you like added?**
A clear description of the feature or algorithm (e.g. "DBSCAN clustering", "STL file format support", "Python binding for `mesh_union`").

**Which crate does this belong to?**
- [ ] `threecrate-core` — data structures / traits
- [ ] `threecrate-algorithms` — point cloud / mesh algorithms
- [ ] `threecrate-io` — file format support
- [ ] `threecrate-reconstruction` — surface reconstruction
- [ ] `threecrate-simplification` — mesh simplification
- [ ] `threecrate-gpu` — GPU acceleration
- [ ] `threecrate-visualization` — 3D viewer
- [ ] `threecrate-python` — Python bindings
- [ ] Other / unsure

**Motivation**
Why is this useful? What use case does it enable?

**References**
Link to a paper, Open3D/PCL equivalent, or any prior art that describes the algorithm or API:

**Would you be willing to implement this?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement it (great — please also read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it for someone else to pick up
